O0450B Date Therapy Resumed CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the date on which the therapy regime resumed. effective 10/01/2011
discontinued 9/30/2019
539 O0500A_PSV_ROM_NUM O0500A_PSV_ROM_NUM O0500A Restorative Nursing: Passive Range of Motion Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received passive range of motion (ROM) for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
